meaning: adj.[生]对活质起作用的,生物活性的
examples: A bioactive substance is obtained from a culture of the bacillus amyloliquefaciens strain CH1.
Bioactive materials are equally important to growth of Marine life found in coral reefs.
Bioceramic is an important part of bioactive frame applied widely in tissue engineering.
Long before Activia came Yakult, a bioactive yogurt-like drink from Japan that is now available worldwide.
